entries.question: How do I create a new team account?
entries.answer: Go to our signup page, enter your email and team details. You'll receive a verification email. Once verified, you can invite team members and set up your workspace.

entries.question: How do I reset my password?
entries.answer: Click 'Forgot Password' on the login page. Enter your email and we'll send a reset link. The link expires in 24 hours for security.

entries.question: How do I add team members to my account?
entries.answer: Go to Settings > Team Members > Invite. Enter their email addresses and select their role (Admin, Member, Viewer). They'll receive an invitation email.

entries.question: What are the different user roles?
entries.answer: Admin: Full access including billing. Member: Can create and edit content. Viewer: Read-only access. Custom roles available on Enterprise plans.

entries.question: How do I enable two-factor authentication?
entries.answer: Go to Settings > Security > Two-Factor Auth. Scan the QR code with your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy) and enter the code to enable.

entries.question: What payment methods do you accept?
entries.answer: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, Amex), PayPal, and wire transfers for annual Enterprise plans. All payments are processed securely via Stripe.

entries.question: How do I upgrade my plan?
entries.answer: Go to Settings > Billing > Change Plan. Select your new plan and the change takes effect immediately. You'll be prorated for the remainder of your billing cycle.

entries.question: Can I get a refund?
entries.answer: We offer a 14-day money-back guarantee for new subscriptions. Contact support within 14 days of purchase for a full refund. No questions asked.

entries.question: How do I cancel my subscription?
entries.answer: Go to Settings > Billing > Cancel Subscription. Your access continues until the end of your billing period. You can reactivate anytime.

entries.question: Do you offer annual discounts?
entries.answer: Yes! Annual plans get 20% off compared to monthly billing. Enterprise annual plans also include dedicated support and custom onboarding.

entries.question: How do I update my billing information?
entries.answer: Go to Settings > Billing > Payment Methods. You can update your card, change billing address, and download invoices.

entries.question: What's included in the Free plan?
entries.answer: Free includes: 3 team members, 5 projects, 1GB storage, basic integrations, and community support. Great for trying out our platform!

entries.question: What's included in the Pro plan?
entries.answer: Pro includes: Unlimited team members, unlimited projects, 100GB storage, all integrations, priority support, advanced analytics, and API access.

entries.question: What's included in Enterprise?
entries.answer: Enterprise includes everything in Pro plus: SSO/SAML, custom roles, unlimited storage, dedicated CSM, SLA guarantees, and on-premise deployment options.

entries.question: How do I export my data?
entries.answer: Go to Settings > Data > Export. Choose your format (JSON, CSV) and scope. Exports are generated within 24 hours and emailed to you.

entries.question: What integrations are available?
entries.answer: We integrate with Slack, Microsoft Teams, Jira, GitHub, GitLab, Notion, Google Workspace, Salesforce, HubSpot, and 50+ more via Zapier.

entries.question: How do I set up Slack integration?
entries.answer: Go to Settings > Integrations > Slack > Connect. Authorize access to your Slack workspace and select channels for notifications.

entries.question: How do I connect to Jira?
entries.answer: Go to Settings > Integrations > Jira > Add. Enter your Jira URL and API token. Select which projects to sync and configure field mappings.

entries.question: Do you have a Zapier integration?
entries.answer: Yes! Connect to 5000+ apps via Zapier. Search for TechStart in Zapier and connect your account to create automated workflows.

entries.question: Can I build custom integrations?
entries.answer: Yes! Use our REST API or webhooks to build custom integrations. Full API documentation at docs.techstart.io. Enterprise plans include integration support.

entries.question: How do I get an API key?
entries.answer: Go to Settings > API > Create Key. Name your key, set permissions, and optionally set an expiration. Keep your key secure - it won't be shown again.

entries.question: What are the API rate limits?
entries.answer: Free: 100 requests/hour. Pro: 1000 requests/hour. Enterprise: 10000 requests/hour. Rate limit headers are included in all responses.

entries.question: Where can I find API documentation?
entries.answer: Full API documentation at docs.techstart.io. Includes getting started guide, endpoint reference, SDKs, and code examples in Python, JavaScript, and Go.

entries.question: Do you have SDKs available?
entries.answer: Yes! Official SDKs for Python, JavaScript/TypeScript, and Go. Community SDKs for Ruby, PHP, and Java. All available on GitHub and npm/pip.

entries.question: How do I handle API errors?
entries.answer: All errors return standard HTTP status codes with detailed JSON error objects. Check docs.techstart.io/errors for a complete error reference and handling best practices.

entries.question: Is my data secure?
entries.answer: Yes! We use AES-256 encryption at rest, TLS 1.3 in transit. SOC2 Type II certified, GDPR compliant. We never sell your data. Full security details at techstart.io/security.

entries.question: How do I delete my account?
entries.answer: Go to Settings > Account > Delete Account. You'll have 30 days to change your mind. After that, all data is permanently deleted per our retention policy.

entries.question: Do you have a mobile app?
entries.answer: Yes! Available for iOS and Android. Search 'TechStart' in the App Store or Google Play. The mobile app syncs with your web account in real-time.
